response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive experience as a Senior Fullstack Engineer with 6+ years in primary stack technologies (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Nest.js) and deep expertise in enterprise-level systems at top-tier companies like Google and Meta. His background includes AI-agent development, scalability, and performance optimization, aligning well with the role's requirements. While his resume lacks explicit mention of Vitest and some secondary technologies (e.g., Kotlin/Java), his breadth of experience and contributions to open-source projects suggest strong adaptability.
strengths: Extensive experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React in enterprise environments (Google, Meta)
Strong background in AI-agent infrastructure and scalable backend systems (AWS, MongoDB)
Open-source contributions and leadership in technical communities (workshops, talks, mentorship)
concerns: Resume lacks explicit mention of Vitest, a required testing framework for the role
Limited detail on Kotlin/Java experience, which is listed as a secondary technology
Multiple short tenures at some roles (e.g., RIDE Capital, Dunnhumby) may raise questions about stability

key_factors.factor: Primary stack expertise (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Nest.js)
